bible.title: Oink Oink Lost: Dino Birthday Party

setting.name: Dino Birthday Party Meadow
setting.description: A sunny meadow dressed up for a dinosaur birthday party. There are paper flags, big balloons, party hats, and snack tables with yummy treats.

player.description: A tiny baby pig with a round pink snout and bright curious eyes.
player.accessory: A little blue party hat that keeps slipping over one ear

bible.narratorIntro: Piglet toddles into a dinosaur birthday party and sniffs the sweet air. Mama Pig is somewhere here, and three friendly neighbors each have a little clue.

buildings.name: Cupcake Tent
buildings.exteriorDescription: A striped party tent with frosting swirls painted on the sign.
buildings.interiorDescription: Inside are shiny trays of cupcakes, sprinkles, and a giggly cake table.

buildings.name: Bounce Barn
buildings.exteriorDescription: A round wooden barn with bouncy party music and painted dinosaur footprints.
buildings.interiorDescription: Inside is a soft play space with hop balls, ribbon streamers, and happy little boings.

buildings.name: Gift Gazebo
buildings.exteriorDescription: A flower-trimmed gazebo with wrapped presents stacked in neat piles.
buildings.interiorDescription: Inside are ribbons, boxes, and a table for birthday cards.

buildings.name: Snack Stand
buildings.exteriorDescription: A cheerful snack cart with juice cups and dino-shaped cookies.

buildings.name: Balloon Patch
buildings.exteriorDescription: A patch of grass tied with colorful balloon strings.

npcs.name: Mimi Moosetail
npcs.appearance: A spotted cow with a ribbon on her ear and a cupcake crumb on her nose.
npcs.personality: Cheery, careful, and proud of her baking.

lines.greeting: Hiya, Piglet! Want a sweet clue?
lines.hint: Mama went somewhere that smells like frosting and sweet cake.
lines.idle: I am guarding the sprinkles. Very important work!

smallTalkFacts: The cupcake tent has swirly frosting signs.
The party tables are covered in bright cloths.
The cupcakes are topped with tiny sugar stars.
conversation.clueLeadIn: I noticed where Mama went because I was carrying treats.

npcs.name: Tilly Trunks
npcs.appearance: A small gray elephant with a confetti collar and big floppy ears.
npcs.personality: Friendly, playful, and a little bit squishy-footed.

lines.greeting: Hello, little piggy! I saw something wiggly.
lines.hint: Mama went somewhere beside the center path.
lines.idle: My ears love party songs. They wiggle right along!

smallTalkFacts: The bounce barn has soft mats on the floor.
Party music makes the ribbons flutter.
Kids like to hop in tiny bouncy steps.
conversation.clueLeadIn: I saw Mama because I was bouncing near the music.

npcs.name: Nibbles Nuzzle
npcs.appearance: A fluffy tan rabbit with a bow tie and a basket of gift tags.
npcs.personality: Polite, quick, and excited about surprises.

lines.greeting: Hello there! I have a neat little clue.
lines.hint: Mama went somewhere with a shiny cake table.
lines.idle: I love sorting tags. Each present gets a name!

smallTalkFacts: The gift gazebo is trimmed with flowers.
Wrapped boxes are stacked by the table.
Birthday cards have shiny crayon drawings.
conversation.clueLeadIn: I peeked up when a ribbon fluttered past.

hints.text: Mama went somewhere that smells like frosting and sweet cake.
Mama went somewhere beside the center path.
Mama went somewhere with a shiny cake table.

bible.reunionLine: Mama Pig nuzzles Piglet close. "There you are, my little party snout!"
bible.verification: attribute: Cupcake Tent, Snack Stand; direction: Cupcake Tent, Bounce Barn; object: Cupcake Tent, Bounce Barn, Snack Stand. Only Cupcake Tent matches all three.
